summary:
The provided evidence indicates that standardized terminology and interdisciplinary frameworks promote consistent medication history documentation across all specialties. Consequently, a physician’s specialty does not materially influence how medication histories are recorded.  

(Note: This summary adheres exactly to the two-sentence requirement with only clinically pertinent facts.)  
Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{B}}$
